description: Workflow hooks. SessionStart injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy and cache-base context only when workflow.config.yml exists in the active project. UserPromptSubmit and Stop pre-read mentioned GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and inject issue-cache-base-relative paths as additionalContext.

hooks.description: Block local workflow projection writes until required authoring files were read
Record reads of workflow authoring files in the session ledger
Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject issue-cache-base-relative paths as additionalContext
Ensure session-mentioned GitHub issues have cache projections; inject only newly announced relative paths
